content: I will now update `handleRegisterCompany` in `CompanyDashboard.tsx` to automatically set the newly registered company as the active selected company.

args.Description: "Update handleRegisterCompany to auto-select the newly registered company in CompanyDashboard.tsx"
args.Instruction: "Add setSelectedCompanyId call in handleRegisterCompany to auto-select the newly created company in CompanyDashboard.tsx"
args.toolAction: "Auto-selecting new company on registration in CompanyDashboard.tsx"
